automation.title: Automation
automation.routinesHint: After creation, Claude commands will be executed on schedule while Monet is running

routineForm.schedulePlaceholder: Natural language, e.g. "every day at 9am", "every Monday at 3pm"
routineForm.cronLabel: Cron expression (min hour day month weekday)
routineForm.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Check all my GitHub repos for open PR status and give a summary
routineForm.cronRequired: Cron expression is required (enter a schedule and click AI Parse)

automation.runFailedHint: Open the log icon on the task row for details

settings.title: Settings
settings.extensionsDesc: Optional features. Enable with one click, disable anytime. Each card explains what it writes.

claudeEnv.title: Local Environment
claudeEnv.latestUnknown: Latest version lookup failed (offline or npm registry unreachable); showing local version only.
claudeEnv.upgradeUnchanged: Command succeeded but version unchanged — may already be latest, or a terminal restart is needed.
claudeEnv.singleOk: Only one installation found — no conflicts.
claudeEnv.multiWarning: Found {count} separate installations — which one your terminal uses depends on PATH order and may differ from Monet.

turnSignal.title: Session Status Tracking
turnSignal.desc: Uses official Claude Code hooks for strong signals: sessions in external terminals show running / completed / waiting / error states in the monitor rail, with desktop notifications when they finish or stall. No silence-based guessing.
turnSignal.writes1: Adds 5 status hooks to Claude Code settings (auto-backup first; uninstall restores):
turnSignal.writes2: Signal script (dependency-free shell, appends only to its own signal file):
turnSignal.writes3: Original session JSONL files remain untouched — zero writes.

permCheck.title: Permission Checkup
permCheck.desc: macOS records permission grants per process. Monet has two ledgers: the main app (foreground sessions and workbench tasks) and the background task runner (scheduled tasks launched independently by launchd). Missing permissions cause silent failures — grant everything here in one pass.
permCheck.runnerGroupDesc: Scheduled tasks are launched by launchd with a permission ledger separate from the main app. The check runs a self-test through the real launchd path (identical context to scheduled tasks). First-time grants happen via system prompts during an actual run, or manually in System Settings for monet-routine-runner.
permCheck.stillDeniedHint: The system won't prompt again for denied records. Open the corresponding System Settings panel, remove the old monet-routine-runner entry, then hit Request again
permCheck.screenRestartHint: If you just allowed screen recording, restart Monet for it to take effect

rows.automationTerminalDesc: Required by "Resume in Terminal" to control Terminal
rows.notificationsDesc: Alerts when tasks finish or Claude asks a question
rows.fullDiskAccessDesc: Needed when tasks read/write protected folders (Desktop, Documents, …)
rows.accessibilityDesc: Needed when tasks simulate input or read the UI
rows.screenCaptureDesc: Needed when tasks take screenshots to observe the screen
rows.localNetworkDesc: Access LAN devices and local dev servers (no system API to detect)
rows.automationSystemEventsDesc: Needed to put the machine back to sleep after scheduled runs

settings.themeLightHint: Used when system appearance is light
settings.themeDarkHint: Used when system appearance is dark
settings.customLangPlaceholder: Type a language, e.g. "Indonesian", "Swahili", "ภาษาลาว"
settings.translating: AI is translating the entire interface, this may take about a minute…
settings.translateSuccess: Translation complete, switch above to use it
settings.langNotRecognized: Could not recognize the target language, try rephrasing
settings.minColumnWidthHint: Minimum width per workbench column. Hold Shift while dragging a divider to adjust.
settings.routineWakeHint: How to handle routines when the laptop is asleep
settings.routineWakePassive: Passive — run when the computer naturally wakes up
settings.routineWakeActive: Active — wake the computer before scheduled run, sleep after
settings.routineWakeActiveSub: Requires AC power · Authorize once, then schedule changes apply silently
settings.routineWakeAuthBody:
Enabling active wake requires one-time admin authorization:

The system will prompt for your password to add a passwordless rule to /etc/sudoers.d, scoped to pmset (power management) only. After that, creating or changing routines applies silently — no more password prompts.

You can remove the authorization here at any time.
settings.routineWakeAuthDenied: Authorization cancelled, staying in passive mode
settings.routineWakeAuthRemoved: System authorization removed, wake schedule cleared
settings.widgetDayBoundaryHint: When the desktop widget's "today" period begins
settings.widgetMonthBoundaryHint: Affects monthly tokens, cost, model mix and other stats
settings.trayTitleHint: Quota metrics shown next to the tray icon
settings.trayAutostartHint: Starts at login, runs independently of the main app; turning off removes the menu bar icon
settings.trayLaunchFail: Launch failed — reinstall the app and try again
settings.channelDesc1: Each channel can override Claude Code's global settings. When a session starts, all fields in
settings.channelDesc2: the channel replace the corresponding global settings.
settings.noChannels: No channels yet. Add one to switch per-session from the top bar.
settings.deleteChannelConfirm: Delete channel "{name}"? This will delete channels/{id}.json and cannot be undone.
settings.advisorWarning: ⚠ Advisor tier must be ≥ primary model · Official channel only
settings.hide1mModels: Hide 1M tier models requiring usage credits
settings.autoDetect: Auto-detect availability (dim unavailable tiers after selection)
settings.agentDesc: Built-in AI Agent toggles. Enabling will slightly increase token usage.
settings.agentTitleDesc: Auto-generate and revise session titles from conversation content
settings.agentPermissionHintDesc: AI-powered explanation of tool call risks during approval
settings.agentSettingsExplainDesc: Plain-language explanation of Claude Code config fields
settings.agentCronParseDesc: Convert natural language to cron expressions
settings.agentTagsDesc: Auto-generate and revise session tags from conversation content
settings.agentSummaryDesc: Auto-generate 2-3 sentence session summaries for quick review
settings.agentTranslateDesc: Translate the UI into user-defined languages
settings.agentSessionPersistDesc: Save agent calls and routine runs as Claude session files (official channel path only) for traceability; turn off to leave no trace. The directory never appears in Archive or Search
settings.htmlVisualDesc: Let AI use richer formatting in workbench sessions: side-by-side comparison cards, grouped info panels, collapsible details, and more. Injects a prompt to guide AI formatting; only affects sessions started from Monet.
settings.diagDesc: Scan all session files and check record type and tool parsing coverage.

channelForm.idPlaceholder: e.g. my-proxy, work, backup (saved as channels/<id>.json)
channelForm.idError: ID can only contain letters, numbers, - and _ ("official" is reserved). This becomes the channel filename.
channelForm.tokenError: Auth Token is required for new channels
channelForm.agentModelHint: Model for agent calls (translate/summary/tags). Leave empty to use default Claude models
channelForm.defaultModelPlaceholder: e.g. sonnet or a full model ID
channelForm.defaultsHint: Preset used when a session has no manual override; stored in the channel file itself, so terminal claude --settings behaves the same.

modelMap.title: Advanced · Model Mapping
modelMap.intro: Redirect the official roles (Fable/Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) to this channel’s actual models; the session dropdown will show these roles. Leave blank to skip mapping and use the channel default.
modelMap.fetchHint: Probes the channel’s /v1/models; candidates autocomplete on success
modelMap.oneMHint: Check to use the 1M context for this model (appends the [1m] suffix on save)
modelMap.customHint: The custom slot’s value enters the CLI /model menu and passes model validation directly.

officialDefaults.title: Official Channel · Defaults
officialDefaults.intro: The official channel uses OAuth with zero injection; this only configures session presets (stored in app settings, never written to ~/.claude/settings.json).

mcp.title: MCP Tool Service
mcp.description: Register Monet with Claude Code so you can search session history, manage local routines, and more via natural language in any Claude Code session — without opening Monet.
mcp.exampleSearch: "Find sessions where we discussed the auth refactor"
mcp.exampleRoutine: "Create a local routine to check server status every day at 9am"

claudeBin.title: Claude CLI Path
claudeBin.description: The executable used whenever a claude process is launched (sessions, agents, routines). Auto-detected by default; can be set manually.
claudeBin.manualInvalid: Manual path is invalid; fell back to auto-detection

claudeInstall.title: Install Claude Code
claudeInstall.hint: Install with any method below, then click Re-detect.

claudeRoot.title: Claude Data Directory
claudeRoot.description: Root directory where Monet reads Claude Code session data. Set this if your data lives in a non-default location (e.g. via CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR).
claudeRoot.envControlled: Controlled by CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR environment variable — cannot be changed here

cliConfig.title: Claude Code Configuration
cliConfig.subtitle: Read/write ~/.claude/settings.json
cliConfig.sourceExtracted: Extracted from CLI source code, reliable
cliConfig.selectEditor: Select a complex field to edit

settings.agentSessionDirMissing: No persisted sessions yet (directory not created)

permission.title: Permission Request
permission.allowSessionHint: Auto-approve same tool + same key params within this session, until stream ends or session switches
permission.allowServerHint: Writes an mcp__{server} rule to global settings.json: every tool from this server (including future ones) is permanently allowed across projects, effective immediately

plan.title: Plan Pending Approval

topbar.extraArgsFoot: Appended to the launch command · restarts on next message

topbar.permDontAskDesc: Deny operations not in allow list
topbar.automationDeniedHint: Allow Monet to control Terminal in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Automation

memory.title: Memory
memory.selectToView: Select from list to view details
memory.legacyIndexNote: This project's MEMORY.md uses the legacy plain text format; orphan detection is exempted.
memory.orphanSuggest: Not indexed in MEMORY.md; consider adding to index or deleting
memory.danglingSuggest: File has been deleted; consider removing this line from MEMORY.md
memory.brokenLinkSuggest: Target memory does not exist; consider updating or removing the link
memory.allClear: All three checks passed, no issues
memory.editTip: File will be verified as unmodified before saving
memory.externallyModified: File has been modified externally, please reload
memory.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
memory.deleteNote: The file will be moved to the Monet trash (~/.monet/trash) and will not be permanently deleted. The corresponding index line will also be removed from MEMORY.md.
